description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses a default Docker image docker:${DOCKER_VERSION} (with DOCKER_VERSION set to 28.2.2) and runs on runners tagged gitlab-org. Define a .common:docker-in-docker template that adds the docker:${DOCKER_VERSION}-dind service, tags gitlab-org-docker, and sets Docker environment variables DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2376/, and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR=/certs. Define a .common:stage-done template that extends .rules:merge-requests, uses the alpine:latest image, sets GIT_STRATEGY=none, and runs the script commands echo "${CI_JOB_STAGE} done!" and exit 0. Also set CI_IMAGE to registry.gitlab.com/gitlab-org/ci-cd/docker-machine/ci:go1.24.6-alpine3.22 and USE_CONTAINER='true'.
